name: Gingerbread Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening with the sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Mix in the molasses and sour cream.
4. Combine the remaining ingredients and stir into the mixture until just moistened and no flour streaks remain.
5. Fill muffin tins coated with non-stick spray to 1/2 full with batter.
6. Bake at 375 degrees F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until done.
7. Serve warm.
